purpose.statement: Preserve critical context and continuity when people, teams, or responsibilities change, so that knowledge is not lost and work does not need to be rediscovered.

checklist.entry: records what is known at a point in time
supports safe transition between people or teams

template_block.name: when-this-brief-should-be-used
template_block.title: When this brief should be used

checklist.entry: responsibility moves between teams or suppliers

template_block.statement: This is a continuity artefact, not a status report.

checklist.entry: Area covered by this brief: (Discovery, Alpha, Live ops, governance, etc.)
Audience: (who this handover is intended for)

template_block.name: current-understanding-at-time-of-writing
template_block.title: Current understanding (at time of writing)
template_block.statement: Describe what is understood now, without asserting correctness.

checklist.entry: How the problem is currently framed
What is explicitly not in scope

template_block.name: decisions-taken-historical-record-only
template_block.title: Decisions taken (historical record only)
template_block.statement: List decisions that have already been made, without justifying or revisiting them.

checklist.entry: Absence of a decision does not imply indecision.
This is a factual record, not an endorsement.

template_block.name: assumptions
template_block.title: Assumptions
template_block.statement: List assumptions currently underpinning the work, with their status.

constraints.boundary: List known constraints (policy, legal, technical, operational).

template_block.name: known-risks-and-uncertainties
template_block.title: Known risks and uncertainties

checklist.entry: areas with limited or no evidence
dependencies that are fragile or unclear

template_block.statement: Avoid speculation about causes or solutions.

template_block.name: dependencies-and-interfaces
template_block.title: Dependencies and interfaces
template_block.statement: Describe who or what this work depends on, without assigning responsibility.
